name: Elephant Ear Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and molasses.
2. Add the melted shortening to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Beat in the egg, sour milk, salt dissolved in milk, cinnamon, nutmeg, and vanilla.
4. Gradually mix in the flour until the dough is smooth.
5. Chopped raisins can be added at this stage if desired.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 375°F (190°C) in an oven.
